special_mechanics.name: Character-Specific Throws
special_mechanics.description: Each character has unique throwing mechanics. Flynn has effective throws, Echo can execute Frankensteiner throw, Al and Orbot use grabbing/piledriver moves, Prokop uses wrestling throws more powerful than Al's

special_mechanics.name: Special Moves
special_mechanics.description: Each character has unique special attack move (Dragon Wave/Electric Shock for Flynn, Bird Storm/scream for Echo, Assault Tiger for Al, Thunder Edge for Prokop, Double German Suplex for Rick Norton)

special_mechanics.name: Character Transformation
special_mechanics.description: Flynn can transform into a muscle-bound super being when severely injured

special_mechanics.name: Character-Specific Abilities
special_mechanics.description: Al and Orbot can shoot projectiles; Prokop can channel electricity; Orbot has extended reach due to long arms and can burn enemies with blue flame

tier_notes: Tier 3: Empirical/qualitative data only. Wikipedia source provides gameplay mechanics and character descriptions but no specific physics parameters (speeds, gravity values, acceleration, jump heights, etc.). All quantitative movement data is undocumented.
